problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: If Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus is applied to reversed, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
